info.description:
Welcome to Flyff Universe Public API! The API is still in development and specifications can change as well as the main URL. Check Flyff Official Fansite Kit for high-quality 2D assets. Contact the developers by mail or on the official Discord if you have questions, suggestions, or a bug to report. Copyright 2021-2024 © Gala Lab Corp. All Rights Reserved. Permission to use the data and images granted only for information sites and tools about the official game. Gala Lab reserves the right to no longer grant this permission at any time. Commercial use strictly prohibited. Use for in-game automation and cheating tools, or use in any other video game is strictly prohibited. Please contact the developers if you wish to verify that your use of this API is in accordance with the copyright.
# Introduction Currently limited to 300 calls per minute per IP. No size limitation on the request and the response. Feel free to cache the results and fetch the data only when the data version changes. Version History:
  • 2024/03/15 - Data update.
  • 1.5.3 - 2024/05/15 - Data update and new stats, states, and menus.
  • 1.5.4 - 2024/08/15 - Data update and new eventupgrade menu.
  • 2024/09/15 - Data update.
  • 1.6.0 - 2024/10/16 - Data update and API update for Battle for Madrigal expansion.
  • 2024/10/24 - Data update.
  • 1.7.0 - 2024/11/28 - Data update and API update for the Lifestyle update.
  • 1.8.0 - 2025/04/24 - Data update and API update ahead of FWC 2025.
  • 1.9.0 - 2025/11/27 - Data update and API update for Muran's Awakening expansion.
  • 1.9.1 - 2025/11/28 - Data update and minor API update.
  • 1.9.2 - 2026/01/23 - Data update and minor API update.
info.title: Flyff Universe API

get.summary: Get the version of the game data

get.summary: Get a list of parameter names
get.description: Returns the localized text object for the specified parameters' names

tree.description: Skill tree image for the class

minLevel.description: Minimum player level for the Class

maxLevel.description: Maximum player level for the Class

maxHP.description: Formula to compute the maximum Hit Points of the player

maxFP.description: Formula to compute the maximum Fatigue Points of the player

maxMP.description: Formula to compute the maximum Mana Points of the player

attackSpeed.description: Attack speed constant used in attack speed calculation

block.description: Blocking constant used in block calculation

critical.description: Critical chance constant used in critical chance calculation

autoAttackFactors.description: Auto attack damage factors used in damage calculation

defense.description: Defense factor use in defensive calculations

magicDefenseStaFactor.description: Magic defense factor based on STA used in defensive calculations

magicDefenseIntFactor.description: Magic defense factor based on INT used in defensive calculations

productionType.description: The type of production this recipe relates to

masteryPointsReward.description: The amount of mastery points rewarded when this recipe is created

masteryPointsRequired.description: The amount of mastery points required to produce this recipe

requiredAchievement.description: The ID of the achievement with the title required to produce this recipe

time.description: The amount of time in seconds it takes to fully produce an item from this recipe

resultOptions.description: A list of the possible items this recipe can yield, depending on the grade of the ingredients used in the process

items.description: The ID of the item produced

HousingPack.description: Housing prop pack, containing objects, NPCs, and/or gathering objects

objects.description: Array of props and furniture available in the pack

minScale.description: The minimum scale the object can be scaled to

maxScale.description: The maximum scale the object can be scaled to

gatheringObjects.description: Array of gathering objects available in the pack

minScale.description: The minimum scale the object can be scaled to

maxScale.description: The maximum scale the object can be scaled to

npcs.description: Array of NPCs available in the pack

abilities.description: Special Abilities applied to the player when wearing or using the Item

world.description: The ID of the template's world

locations.description: Locations where you can find the NPC

repeatable.description: Whether the Quest can be completed several times or not

removable.description: Whether the Quest can be removed by the player or not

partyShare.description: Whether monster kill count and item drops are shared across party members on the same Quest or not

beginNPC.description: ID of the NPC launching the Quest

minLevel.description: Minimum level required to begin the Quest

maxLevel.description: Maximum level required to begin the Quest

beginClasses.description: List of player Classes able to begin the Quest

beginQuests.description: List of Quests required to begin the Quest

completed.description: Whether the Quest needs to be completed or just launched

beginReceiveItems.description: List of Items received when launching the Quest

endNPC.description: ID of the NPC completing the Quest

endNeededItems.description: List of Items required to complete the Quest

endTimeLimit.description: Maximum time in seconds to complete the Quest

endTalkNPC.description: ID of the NPC to talk to before completing the Quest

endVisitPlace.description: Place to visit before completing the Quest

endKillMonsters.description: List of Monsters to kill before completing the Quest

monster.description: IDs of any of the eligible monsters to kill

endRemoveItems.description: List of Items removed when completing the Quest

count.description: Number of items removed. If the value is absent then all items with the ID are removed from the player's inventory

endReceiveGold.description: Amount of Penya received when completing the Quest. If the value is null then the player will receive Penya but the amount is hidden

endReceiveExperience.description: Amount of experience in % given to the player completing the Quest on a specific level. If the value is null then the player will receive experience but the amount is hidden

endReceiveCoupleExperience.description: Amount of couple experience in % given to the player completing the Quest at each couple level. If the value is null then the player will receive couple experience but the amount is hidden

endReceiveInventorySpaces.description: Inventory spaces unlocked when completing the Quest. If the value is null then the player will unlock spaces but the amount is hidden

endReceiveSkillPoints.description: Skill points received when completing the Quest. If the value is null then the player will receive Skill points but the amount is hidden

endReceiveKarma.description: Karma recovered when completing the Quest. If the value is null then the player will recover Karma but the amount is hidden

endReceiveItems.description: List of Items received when completing the Quest. If the value is null then the player will receive items but they are hidden

upgradeLevel.description: The upgrade level of the received item

soulLinked.description: Whether the item is Soul-Linked to the character or not

descriptionComplete.description: Description of the Quest once it has been completed

dialogsBegin.description: List of Dialogs when the NPC presents the Quest to the player

dialogsAccept.description: List of Dialogs when the player accepts the Quest

dialogsDecline.description: List of Dialogs when the player declines the Quest

dialogsComplete.description: List of Dialogs when the player completes the Quest

dialogsFail.description: List of Dialogs when the player fails to complete the Quest

pointsPerKill.description: The number of points your PK value increases by each kill

decreasePointDelaySec.description: The number of seconds between each PK point decrease

decreasePointCount.description: The number of points decreased every `decreasePointDelaySec`

dropChipMonsterFactor.description: The factor for dropping chips when dying to a monster instead of a player

dropChipPercentages.description: Percentage of chips you will drop based on your stolen chip count

stolenChipsCount.description: The number of chips you have stolen

dropPercent.description: The percentage of your chips you will drop

minimumLevel.description: The minimum player level required to form a couple

formationCooldown.description: The cooldown in seconds to be able to form a couple again after breaking one up

passiveExperienceInterval.description: The interval in seconds between passive experience gain

levels.description: List of couple level ups (first entry represents unlocking level 2) and their information

maximumSkillPoints.description: Maximum couple skill points available when this level is achieved

skillPointReward.description: Couple skill points granted when this level is achieved

bankSlotsUnlocked.description: Couple bank slots unlocked when this level is achieved

baseCheers.description: Base couple cheers at this level, not counting ring bonuses

days.description: The number of consecutive coupled days for this anniversary

reward.description: The ID of the item granted at this anniversary

repeatDays.description: frequency of this anniversary repeating after achieving it, in days

requiredCoupleLevel.description: The couple level required to unlock this skill

requiredSkillPoints.description: The couple skill points consumed when this skill is used

fishingBaits.description: Each fishing bait and the fish it can catch

bait.description: The ID of the bait item

catches.description: The fish this bait can catch

fish.description: The ID of the fish item

chance.description: The chance to catch this fish

learningQuest.description: The ID of the quest required to learn this gathering skill

gatherings.description: A list of gathering objects around the world and what they yield

masteryPointsReward.description: Amount of mastery points rewarded upon gathering

useDurability.description: Amount of wear applied to the tool used to gather

chance.description: The chance to yield this item

width.description: Width of the World in meters

height.description: Height of the World in meters

tileName.description: Name of the world Tiles for navigator

flying.description: Whether players can fly in the World or not

pk.description: Whether players can kill other players in the World or not

inDoor.description: Whether the World has a sky or not

revivalWorld.description: ID of the World where players revive when they die in the World

revivalKey.description: ID of the Lodestar where players revive when they die in the World

town.description: Whether the Continent is a Town or not

transy.description: ID of the Male/Female counterpart EquipSet

bonus.description: Special Abilities when the player wears several parts of the Set

equipped.description: Number of parts required to apply the Ability

accountWide.description: Whether the Achievement is shared per Account

badgeReward.description: The badge received as a reward

value.description: Value to reach to complete the Level

name.description: Name of the Level when there is one

title.description: Title unlocked when completing the Level

attackPower.description: Permanent attack power boost in % against the monsters of the list when completing the Level

inventorySpaces.description: Inventory spaces unlocked when completing the Level

gold.description: Amount of Penya received when completing the Level

items.description: List of items received when completing the Level

soulLinked.description: Whether the item is Soul-Linked to the character or not

mainMonster.description: ID of the main Monster to kill

monsters.description: List of all Monsters that can be killed to complete the Achievement

mainItem.description: ID of the main Item to use

items.description: List of all Items that can be used to complete the Achievement

stats.description: List of all parameters that can be reached to complete the Achievement

mainSkill.description: ID of the main Skill to use

skills.description: List of all Skills that can be used to complete the Achievement

mainClass.description: ID of the main Class to reach

classes.description: List of all Classes that can be reached to complete the Achievement

subcategory.description: Sub category of the Item when there is one

class.description: ID of the Class required to equip or use the Item

level.description: Player level required to equip or use the Item

sex.description: Player sex required to equip or use the Item

stack.description: Number of units that can be stacked

buyPrice.description: Purchase price of the Item at NPC

sellPrice.description: Selling price of the Item at NPC

consumable.description: Whether the Item is a consumable or not

premium.description: Whether the Item is considered as premium or not

deletable.description: Whether the Item can be deleted or not

tradable.description: Whether the Item can be traded or not

shining.description: Whether the 3D Model of the Item has a shining effect or not

elementAttack.description: Element attack value of the item, if it has an element

durationRealTime.description: Whether the Buff duration is counted even when the player is offline or not

transy.description: ID of the Male/Female counterpart Item when it is an armor

dismantle.description: List of dismantling output from this item

item.description: The ID of the output item

inputUpgradeLevel.description: The required upgrade level of the input item

savePiercing.description: Whether or not the input item's piercing is preserved

saveElement.description: Whether or not the input item's element upgrade is preserved

saveUpgrade.description: Whether or not the input item's general upgrade is preserved

upgradeLevel.description: The upgrade level of the output item

upgradeLevels.description: Upgrade level information if the item is an accessory

requiredLevel.description: Level required to wear this item

abilities.description: Abilities applied to the user when wearing this item

cooldown.description: Time in Seconds to use the Item again

casting.description: Time in Seconds to equip or use the Item

duration.description: Duration in Seconds of the Buff

flightSpeed.description: Flying Speed in km/h when the Item is a flying vehicle

guildContribution.description: Amount of Guild contribution experience given when the Item is a Booty

attackSpeed.description: Attack Speed when the Item is a weapon

attackSpeedValue.description: Exact Attack Speed value when the Item is a weapon

attackRange.description: Maximum distance in meters to hit the target when the Item is a weapon

twoHanded.description: Whether the item is two handed or not when the Item is a weapon

minAttack.description: Minimum Attack when the Item is a weapon

maxAttack.description: Maximum Attack when the Item is a weapon

additionalSkillDamage.description: Additional Damage when using a Skill with the weapon

ultimateConvertible.description: Whether or not this item can be converted to ultimate

possibleRandomStats.description: The possible additional stats to roll, if any

consumedMP.description: Consumed Mana Points when doing a Charged Attack with the wand

consumedItem.description: Category of the Item consumed when attacking with the weapon

triggerSkill.description: Skill that can be triggered when using the Item

skill.description: The ID of the Skill triggered

onTarget.description: If the triggered skill is used on the target and not yourself

hasOneOf.description: ID of conditional buffs required for the skill to be triggered

triggerSkillProbability.description: Probability in % to trigger the Skill when using the Item

coupleTeleports.description: Daily couple teleports granted by this item

coupleCheers.description: Daily couple cheers granted by this item

coupleBankSlots.description: Couple bank slots granted by this item

gatheringChance.description: The gathering success chance for this tool

fishingLargeChance.description: The chance to catch a large fish

minimumTargetItemLevel.description: Minimum level the target item needs to be

contents.description: List of items inside the box or pack

item.description: The ID of the item inside the box

count.description: The amount of this item this box contains

chance.description: Chance for the box to yield this item when opened

minDefense.description: Minimum Defense when the Item is an armor

maxDefense.description: Maximum Defense when the Item is an armor

blinkwingTarget.description: Teleport position when the Item is a blinkwing

abilities.description: Special Abilities applied to the player when wearing or using the Item

location.description: Main location where the item drops directly on the ground

spawns.description: Locations where the item drops directly on the ground

class.description: ID of the Class required to use the Skill

level.description: Player level required to use the Skill

abilities.description: Special Abilities applied to the target when using the Skill

magic.description: Whether the Skill is Magic or not

elementType.description: The total element type of the skill, which can be a combination of multiple elements

treePosition.description: The position of the skill on the relevant skill tree

x.description: X position on the tree in pixels

y.description: Y position on the tree in pixels

combo.description: Where the Skill can be placed in the Action Slot

debuff.description: Whether the Skill is used to attack/debuff the target or not

requiresCouple.description: Whether the Skill requires a couple or not

flying.description: Whether the Skill can be used while flying or not

passive.description: Whether the Skill is automatically used or not

consumedItem.description: Category of the Item consumed when using the Skill

triggerSkill.description: Skill that can be triggered when using the Skill

skill.description: The ID of the Skill triggered

onTarget.description: If the triggered skill is used on the target and not yourself

hasOneOf.description: ID of conditional buffs required for the skill to be triggered

skillPoints.description: Number of Skill Points consumed by Skill Level

weapon.description: Sub category of the Weapon required to use the Skill

level.description: Minimum required level of the Skill

changeSkillIfHasBuff.description: True skill used if certain buffs are present

anyOf.description: List of any skill IDs required for the effect

newSkill.description: The skill ID used in the end

checkBuffOnTarget.description: If the buffs will be checked on the target or yourself

requiredSkillStacks.description: Number of skill stacks required on the checked buffs

changeSkillIfAllyTarget.description: True skill ID used if the target of this skill is an ally

cooldownOnEnd.description: If this skill's cooldown starts after expiry

canBeCanceled.description: If this skill can be canceled prematurely

debuffType.description: The type of debuff this skill is

pulseSkill.description: The skill ID of the skill pulsed every second when this skill is active

hymnSkill.description: The skill ID of the skill pulsed and gradually increased when this skill is active

fullChargeSkill.description: The skill ID of the skill used when this skill is fully charged

inheritSkill.description: The skill ID of the base skill this skill inherits

minAttack.description: Minimum Attack if the Skill hits the target

maxAttack.description: Maximum Attack if the Skill hits the target

damageMultiplier.description: Factors applied to the damage value done by the Skill

condition.description: Conditional buffs required for the multiplier to take effect

requiredBuff.description: Skill ID of the required buff to be present

onTarget.description: If the required buff should be present on the target of the skill or yourself

probability.description: Probability in % to apply the Skill effect

probabilityPVP.description: Probability in % to apply the Skill effect in PvP

flyBackProbability.description: Probability in % to make the target fly back in the air

consumedMP.description: Consumed Mana Points when using the Skill

consumedFP.description: Consumed Fatigue Points when using the Skill

cooldown.description: Time in Seconds to use the Skill again

casting.description: Time in Seconds to cast the Skill

duration.description: Duration in Seconds of the Buff

durationPVP.description: Duration in Seconds of the Buff in PvP

dotTick.description: Interval in Seconds between the Damage Over Time

spellRange.description: Maximum distance in meters to use the Skill on the target

wallLives.description: Number of times that the wall can hit when the Skill is Psychic Wall

reflectedDamagePVE.description: Reflected Damage in % when the Skill is Reflex Hit in PvE

reflectedDamagePVP.description: Reflected Damage in % when the Skill is Reflex Hit in PvP

tetherRange.description: Maximum range of the tether before it breaks and removes this buff.

spreadOnExpireRange.description: Maximum range for this buff to spread to a nearby player when it expires.

abilities.description: Special Abilities applied to the target when using the Skill

scalingParameters.description: Skill parameters scaling with one of the player stats

parameter.description: Parameter increased by the stat. Can be one of the Skill abilities, duration or attack.

stat.description: Player stat used for the scaling

part.description: Player equipment used for the scaling

scale.description: Scaling factor. The value added to the parameter is the player stat multiplied by this factor. If the parameter is duration then the unit is the Second.

pvp.description: Whether the scaling is applied in PvP or not

pve.description: Whether the scaling is applied in PvE or not

synergies.description: Skill parameters scaling with one of the player skills' level

parameter.description: Parameter increased by the skill level. Can be one of the Skill abilities, duration or attack.

skill.description: The skill ID used for the scaling

minLevel.description: The minimum level of the skill to start scaling

add.description: Whether or not the synergy bonus is added and not multiplied

scale.description: Scaling factor. The value added to the parameter is the skill level above the minLevel multiplied by this factor. If the parameter is duration then the unit is the Second.

pvp.description: Whether the scaling is applied in PvP or not

pve.description: Whether the scaling is applied in PvE or not

maxTargetsPVP.description: Maximum targets for this skill in PvP

requiredHPThresholdRate.description: HP percentage required to use this skill. When the value is negative, it requires the player to be below the value

consumedMaxHPRate.description: Percentage of max HP consumed by this skill

consumedCurrentHPRate.description: Percentage of current HP consumed by this skill

consumedSkillStacks.description: Skill stacks consumed by this skill

count.description: Number of stacks consumed from the skill

probability.description: The probability percentage that the stacks will be consumed

maxSkillStacks.description: Maximum number of stacks this skill can have

maxSkillStacksPVP.description: Maximum number of stacks this skill can have in PVP

stackAbilities.description: Whether or not this skill will scale its abilities by the number of stacks

chargeTime.description: Time in seconds to fully charge this skill

gainedSkillStacks.description: Skill stacks gained when this skill is used

skill.description: The skill ID of the skill stacks gained

count.description: The number of skill stacks gained

countPVP.description: The number of skill stacks gained in PVP

probability.description: The probability percentage that the stacks are gained

level.description: Party level required to use the Party Skill

consumedPoints.description: Consumed Party Points when using the Party Skill

duration.description: Duration in Seconds of the Party Skill when it is a Buff

event.description: Whether the monster is an event monster or not

levelHidden.description: Whether the monster's level is hidden or not

area.description: Type of area where the Monster spawns

booty.description: ID of the booty Item dropped by the Monster

mineral.description: ID of the mineral Item collected on the Catcher Monster

flying.description: Whether the Monster is flying or not

hitRate.description: Ability of the Monster to inflict a successful hit to its target

parry.description: Ability of the Monster to receive a Miss from its attacker. This value is equivalent to lowering the attacker's hitRate

runaway.description: Whether the Monster can run away when its Hit Points are low or not

resistFire.description: The monster's resistance to this element

resistWater.description: The monster's resistance to this element

resistWind.description: The monster's resistance to this element

resistEarth.description: The monster's resistance to this element

resistElectricity.description: The monster's resistance to this element

summoned.description: List of Monsters which can be summoned by the Monster

skill.description: The ID of the applied skill

level.description: The level of the applied skill

probability.description: Chance for the applied skill to apply on hit

conditionalBuff.description: The ID of the buff required to be on the monster for this applied skill to be applied.

avenge.description: List of monsters this monster avenges

monster.description: The ID of the monster to avenge

skill.description: The ID of the gained skill

skillLevel.description: The level of the gained skill

berserkThresholdHP.description: Threshold in % of Hit Points to activate the Monster's berserk mode

berserkAttackPower.description: Attack Power bonus in % when Monster's berserk mode is active

recoveryThresholdHP.description: Threshold in % of Hit Points to recover the Monster's Hit Points

recoveryAmountHP.description: Amount of Hit Points in % recovered when the threshold is reached

experience.description: Amount of experience in % given to the player killing the Monster at the same level

experienceSharing.description:
How the experience is distributed to the players
* `normal` Experience is shared by amount of Damage done to the Monster and among Party members if there is a Party
* `area` Experience is shared between all players in the area

experienceTable.description: Amount of experience in % given to the player killing the Monster alone on a specific level

minDropGold.description: Minimum amount of Penya dropped by the Monster

maxDropGold.description: Maximum amount of Penya dropped by the Monster

attacks.description: Weapons used by the Monster to attack

attackRange.description: Maximum distance in meters to hit the target

triggerSkill.description: ID of the Skill that can be triggered

triggerSkillProbability.description: Probability in % to trigger the Skill

drops.description: List of items dropped by the Monster

probabilityRange.description: Probability range in % to get the item from a killed Monster. It is the absolute probability and does not indicate the rules for the distribution of the items.

common.description: Whether the drop is common to all monsters with this level or is specific to the Monster

location.description: Main location where the monster spawns

addMax.description: The maximum possible value to be added. When present, add is the minimum value

rate.description: Whether the value is a % rate or a flat value

attribute.description: Type of Attribute when the parameter is attribute, cure or attributeimmunity

dotValue.description: Value used to compute the Damage done when attribute is poison or bleeding

dotMode.description: Method used to compute the Damage done when attribute is poison or bleeding

skill.description: ID of the Skill that has a chance to trigger when parameter is skillchance

skillLevel.description: Level of the Skill that has a chance to trigger when parameter is skillchance

pvp.description: Whether the Skill can trigger in PvP or not when parameter is skillchance

pve.description: Whether the Skill can trigger in PvE or not when parameter is skillchance

weaponAttack.description: Attack bonus in % when the upgraded item is a Weapon

helmetDefense.description: Defense bonus in % when the upgraded item is an Helmet

suitDefense.description: Defense bonus in % when the upgraded item is a Suit

gauntletDefense.description: Defense bonus in % when the upgraded item is a Gauntlet

bootsDefense.description: Defense bonus in % when the upgraded item is Boots

shieldDefense.description: Defense bonus in % when the upgraded item is a Shield

setAbilities.description: Special Abilities applied to the player when all his equipment has the upgrade level

menu.description: The name of the NPC menu

count.description: Amount of the item required for the exchange

minUpgradeLevel.description: Minimum upgrade level required on the input item for the exchange

count.description: Amount of the item returned in the exchange

upgradeLevel.description: The upgrade level of the item returned in the exchange

title.description: The prefix or suffix title applied to an item with this stat awake

minimumLevel.description: The minimum item level this awake can appear on

abilities.description: Abilities applied to an item through this awake

skills.description: Object containing possible awakes affecting skills for each rarity

parameters.description: Object containing possible awakes affecting parameters for each rarity

petItemId.description: The ID of the raised pet item

parameter.description: Name of the parameter affected by this raised pet

rate.description: Whether or not the parameter is a rate

values.description: The value of the parameter at each level index

tiers.description: Information of each tier of this raised pet, by index

maxEnergy.description: The maximum total energy of the raised pet in minutes

exp.description: Experience required to level up to the next tier

requiredCandyItem.description: Pet Candy item ID required to grant EXP to this pet tier

graceSkill.description: Skill ID of this tier's grace skill

graceSkillCooldown.description: Cooldown of this tier's grace skill

graceSkillLevel.description: Level of this tier's grace skill

graceSkillDuration.description: Duration of this tier's grace skill

graceSkillEnergyConsumption.description: Energy consumption of this tier's grace skill, in minutes

world.description: The world ID of the dungeon

minLevel.description: The minimum entry level of the dungeon

maxLevel.description: The maximum entry level of the dungeon

cooldownSecs.description: The cooldown of the dungeon in seconds

monsters.description: Array of monster IDs present in the dungeon

monsterMods.description: Array of modifiers applied on all monsters in the dungeon

value.description: The value adjusted by the parameter

maxPlayerCount.description: The maximum limit of players in the dungeon for this modifier to be applied

requiredCreatorQuest.description: The ID of the required completed quest from the creator of the dungeon

requiredCreatorItem.description: The ID of the required item from the creator of the dungeon

requiredCreatorPenya.description: The amount of penya required from the creator of the dungeon

minGuildLevel.description: The minimum guild level required to enter the dungeon

availableCurses.description: The available curses on this dungeon

skill.description: The ID of the curse skill

skillLevel.description: The level of the curse skill

costItem.description: The ID of the required item

continent.description: ID of the Continent in the world

Spawn.description: Object spawn area in the world

left.description: Lower X coordinate in the world

right.description: Upper X coordinate in the world

top.description: Lower Z coordinate in the world

bottom.description: Upper Z coordinate in the world

continent.description: ID of the Continent in the world

aggressivity.description: Probability in % that a spawned monster is aggressive
